diagrams.title: Event Loop Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how the event loop continuously processes events from the queue and dispatches to handlers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how events are processed sequentially in an event-driven system

diagrams.title: Event Propagation Phases
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the three phases of event flow in W3C DOM model: Capture, Target, Bubble
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how events travel through DOM hierarchy during propagation

diagrams.title: Event Delegation Pattern
diagrams.description: Shows how a single parent handler can manage multiple child element events using bubbling
diagrams.purpose: Understanding efficient event management for dynamic elements

diagrams.title: MVC Event Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates how user events flow through Model-View-Controller architecture
diagrams.purpose: Understanding event handling in application architecture patterns

visuals.title: Programming Event Driven Input
visuals.description: Visual diagram for programming event driven input
